{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Enosh forces
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The bulk of the [[Enosh forces]] were focused on the [[Valinhall Travelers]] under [[Talos]]’ command.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
